Wild Magic Cube Group

Weekly cube drafts in Western Mass

Wild Magic Cube

Thursday night cube drafts in Hadley, MA

We aim to foster an inclusive, social environment and friendly competition. All experience levels are welcome, and no cards of your own are needed! Learn about the cube format.

Time and Place

Join us on Thursdays nights at X9 Games in Hadley, MA (Hampshire Mall, by the food court).

Draft fires at 6PM.

Contact

We communicate using X9 Games Discord server. Look for the #cube-draft-night channel.


Cubes

Wild Magic
An evocative, wholly unique environment that re-examines the role of color and synergy in Magic.



Dominarish Legends
A thematic love letter to booster draft-style, limited fundamentals gameplay.



100 Bone Saws
There are 100 Bone Saws.



Strictly Worse
This cube is a homage to and visual feast for cards left behind by the tides of time and power creep.



…and many more, including varieties of well-loved cube staples like Vintage, Peasant, Pauper, and set cubes!
